config.name: Growth Assistant
config.description: Helps you spot landing pages that are quickly gaining traction.
config.author: QuarkA

messages.0: Let’s see which pages are gaining traction. Select a comparison period to get started.
messages.10: We'll start by checking which landing pages have shown the most growth.
messages.30:
This table shows landing pages that gained traction over the past {$check_days} days.
Pages with above-average pageviews in the past 7 days (over {$average_end_pv_count} PV) are highlighted and sorted by growth rate.
messages.40: Let’s take a look at where the traffic is coming from for the top {$top_x} growing pages.
messages.50:
- For CPC or Display: Check for any ad changes during the past {$check_days} days.
- For Organic: Look into keyword and ranking changes in Search Console.
- For Social: Search for your company's content on X, Instagram, Facebook, etc., and see what may have contributed to the growth.
